title: Marketplace
description: Browse priced equipment by category, filter by country compliance, and push items into a BOQ.

steps.title: Product categories
steps.description: Products are grouped into 21 categories with a central taxonomy.
steps.voiceScript: Equipment is grouped by category. Each card shows the supplier price and compliance.
steps.captionText: Equipment is grouped by category. Each card shows the supplier price and compliance.
steps.fallbackMessage: Product categories: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Filter by country
steps.description: Compliance badges reflect the selected country's standards.
steps.voiceScript: Pick your country to see which products are compliant for your market.
steps.captionText: Pick your country to see which products are compliant for your market.
steps.fallbackMessage: Filter by country: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Search a product
steps.description: Search narrows the catalogue as you type.
steps.voiceScript: Search for the item you need, for example an LV cable.
steps.captionText: Search for the item you need, for example an LV cable.
steps.fallbackMessage: Search a product: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Open a product
steps.description: The product page shows specification, supplier and datasheet.
steps.voiceScript: Open a product to see its full specification and datasheet link.
steps.captionText: Open a product to see its full specification and datasheet link.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open a product: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Add to BOQ
steps.description: Selected products flow into your BOM, BOQ and procurement list.
steps.voiceScript: Add the product to a bill of quantities to price your project.
steps.captionText: Add the product to a bill of quantities to price your project.
steps.fallbackMessage: Add to BOQ: not visible on this page yet.
